concepts: The sexual orientation of the friends
current_setting: the first person is straight and the second person is gay
new_settings: the first person is gay and the second person is straight

concepts: The fact that both friends offered to babysit the child
current_setting: both the first person and the second person offered to babysit the child
new_settings: only the first person offered to babysit, while the second person did not

concepts: The relationship of the individuals to the speaker
current_setting: the first person is a friend of the speaker and the second person is also a friend of the speaker
new_settings: the first person is an acquaintance of the speaker and the second person is also an acquaintance of the speaker

current_setting: the child is five years old
new_settings: the child is fifteen years old

concepts: The straight friend’s behavior of asking detailed questions about the child’s daily routine
current_setting: the straight friend asked detailed questions about the child’s daily routine
new_settings: the straight friend asked only general, non‑detailed questions about the child’s daily routine

concepts: The gay friend’s behavior of excitedly introducing himself to the child
current_setting: the gay friend excitedly introduced himself to the child
new_settings: the gay friend was reserved and did not introduce himself to the child

concepts: The intended time period for the babysitting (next week)
current_setting: the babysitting is planned for next week
new_settings: the babysitting is planned for tomorrow

concepts: The purpose/intention of being with the child (to provide care)
current_setting: the purpose of being with the child is to provide care
new_settings: the purpose of being with the child is to use the child as a prop for a video
